opening soon

Hosted servers are opening soon — self-hosting is ready today. The install guides get you the full product, free, on your own hardware.

Choose your server

Both are single-tenant machines in the EU, encrypted with a key only you will hold. You can change tiers later without moving anything.

prefer to run it yourself? self-hosting is free, forever
questions before you commit? read how your data is handled
